---
title: "Introduction"
subtitle: "Course Title"       # CHANGE
date: today
---

## Agenda

- Topic A
- Topic B
- Topic C

::: notes
Personal note: spend ~10 min on motivation, ask students about prior experience.
Appears in speaker view only — never in published output.
:::

## Key Concept {.smaller}

Slide content: concise, visual, bullet-driven.

::: {.highlight-box}
**Definition:** A key term is defined here.
:::

## Shared Content

<!-- shared exercise / table included from _shared/ -->
{{< include ../_shared/_exercise-example.qmd >}}

## Summary

| Concept | Take-away |
|---------|-----------|
| A       | ...       |
| B       | ...       |

::: notes
Remind students: details in the script, Chapter 1.
:::
